specs.title: cp-000: Image opens a file picker and inserts an uploaded image
cp-001: Abstract inserts the structured Background Methods Results Conclusion template
cp-002: Figure Caption inserts the next auto-numbered figure label
cp-003: Table Caption inserts the next auto-numbered table label
cp-004: Footnote prompts for text and inserts a footnote
cp-005: Word Count posts section counts into the chat panel
cp-006: Menu navigable with Arrow UpDown
cp-007: Enter selects highlighted command
cp-008: Escape closes menu
cp-009: Menu positions correctly relative to cursor
cp-010: User messages appear on one side
cp-011: Assistant messages appear on opposite side
cp-012: Messages render plain text content
cp-013: Streaming responses update incrementally
cp-014: Loading spinner shows during response generation
cp-015: Input field with contextual placeholder
cp-016: Submit via Enter key
cp-017: Submit via Send button
cp-018: Empty input cannot be submitted
cp-019: Input clears after submission
cp-020: Error displays in amber warning box
cp-021: Error text from chatError state
cp-022: Error clears on next successful message
cp-023: Write mode AI acts as research assistant
cp-024: Learn mode AI uses Socratic method refuses to write content directly
cp-025: AI behavior adapts to selected guide stage in Learn mode
cp-026: AI behavior adapts to draft intensity in Write mode
cp-027: Tab labeled Research in right panel
cp-028: Open Literature Research Panel button opens ResearchSidebar
cp-029: Instruction text Or press CmdShiftL to toggle
cp-030: Search input with placeholder Quick search PubMed
cp-031: Search button submits query
cp-032: Search opens the external ResearchSidebar the right-panel launcher does not rend
cp-033: Full panel with literature discovery
cp-034: 3 sub-tabs for different searchbrowse modes
